{{CargoRelic
|name=Nuclear-Powered Mini Fan
|class_id=20828
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=To enjoy coolness anywhere and anytime during hot summers, the dev team customized this compact fan. Utilizing an internal miniature reactor, it provides a steady and lasting supply of cool air to its user. The only caution is to avoid exposing it to excessive impact.
|fame=12
|art=19
|fth=15
|civ=11
|tech=31
|ss1=Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +6m<br>Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail ATK +4<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50
|ss2=Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +12m<br>Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail ATK +8<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50
|ss3=Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +18m<br>Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail ATK +12<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50
|ss4=Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +18m<br>Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail ATK +12<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50
|ss7=Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +18m<br>Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail ATK +12<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50<br> (Awakened)
}}
